name: Fantasy Quest Realm Survival
short_description: Hunt monsters, collect crystals, stay alive in a mystical realm.
detailed_description:
Hunt monsters, collect crystals, stay alive in a mystical realm.

Use your magic staff to shoot through endless horde of enemies.

You are trapped in an illusory realm.

After the events of the previous game you have found yourself trapped in an illusion realm, where you fight for survival.

Your goal is to survive for as long as possible.

The enemies will spawn endlessly, you must fight them off in order to survive. They will flock around you if they see you, so you should be on your toes.

Collect crystals and defeat enemies.

There are mystical magical crystals constantly spawning in the realm. Collect them as much as you can while evading the enemies and fighting them for your life.

Good luck wanderer!

Have fun.
